# Test Data

Small deterministic fixtures for correctness tests. Keep files small and
either hand-auditable or generated by a documented script; large or binary
blobs belong in the umbrella `test-vectors/` organization, not here.

`quant_contract_golden.tsv` contains hand-auditable M0 byte vectors for every
canonical layout. Expected values are literal independent oracles; the
correctness test decodes the bytes according to the umbrella specification and
also exercises the public FP8/FP4 decoders. `quant_import_golden.tsv` contains
minimal external checkpoint fragments and their expected normalization for
AWQ, GPTQ, AutoRound, SmoothQuant, and BitNet. The parity checker locks both
fixture inventories and rejects malformed hex or an unknown canonical layout.
